message:
test(readme): cover astype_safe / bool_ / columns_index/multiindex (fd90.277 / br-s0xvz)

Extends readme_type_coercion_compiles_and_runs to cover 6 methods
that previously had no integration coverage:

- DataFrame.astype_safe(dtype, errors) — astype with explicit error
  mode ("raise"/"ignore"/"coerce" — pandas pd.astype(errors=...))
- DataFrame.astype_columns_safe(&[(name, dtype)], errors)
- DataFrame.columns_index → MultiIndexOrIndex
- DataFrame.columns_multiindex → Option<&MultiIndex>
- Series.bool_() — single-element Bool extraction (asserted true)
- Series.astype_safe(dtype, errors)
- Series.axes()

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -801,6 +801,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-rzbu","title":"fp-io read_csv on_bad_lines parameter parity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-21T00:30:14.163803890Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T00:46:11.296127099Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T00:46:11.294353070Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-rzdtb","title":"fd90.114: README pivot_table_with_margins_name missing required margins: bool arg","description":"fd90.74-113 README audit. Line 1237 in Pivot Tables: Full Options shows:

  let pt = df.pivot_table_with_margins_name("revenue", "region", "product", "sum", "Grand Total")?;

But crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:19440 declares:
  pub fn pivot_table_with_margins_name(
      &self,
      values: &str,
      index_col: &str,
      columns_col: &str,
      aggfunc: &str,
      margins: bool,           // <-- README missing this
      margins_name: &str,
  ) -> Result<Self, FrameError>

The README skips the margins flag (which controls whether subtotal rows/cols are emitted). A user copy-pasting hits:
  error[E0061]: this method takes 6 arguments but 5 arguments were supplied

Fix: add 'true' for the margins flag between aggfunc and margins_name. Pure README change.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-26T10:51:25.486885420Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T10:52:44.860093831Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T10:52:44.857391163Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-rzl","title":"Add Series.str.extract_df conformance test coverage","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T07:43:58.169266258Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T07:45:10.940472404Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T07:45:10.938155067Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-s0xvz","title":"fd90.277: Cover astype_safe + bool_ + columns_index + columns_multiindex","description":"fd90.277: Cover astype_safe / astype_columns_safe / bool_ / columns_index / columns_multiindex.

Six methods uncovered:
- Series.astype_safe(dtype, errors) (line 3669) — astype with explicit error mode ("raise"/"ignore"/"coerce")
- Series.bool_() (line 5208) — single-element bool extraction
- Series.axes() (line 5268)
- DataFrame.astype_columns_safe (line 17687)
- DataFrame.astype_safe (line 17717)
- DataFrame.bool_ (line 25037)
- DataFrame.columns_index (line 16240) — returns MultiIndexOrIndex
- DataFrame.columns_multiindex (line 16248) — returns Option<&MultiIndex>

Scope:
- Extend an existing test with all calls.

Files: crates/frankenpandas/tests/readme_quick_example.rs.
